name: Guild Sanction Board
summary: Union-facing sanction authority that disciplines guild misbehavior, contract breaches, and destabilizing market conduct.
motive: Preserve network trust by proving that commercial power remains governable.
power_relations: Works with Union arbitration bodies and merchant guilds
Can check, but not erase, powerful guild influence
visible_membership_base: Sanction clerks, auditors, arbiters, guild delegates.
current_tension_or_vulnerability: If the Board looks captured by insiders, the Union’s claim to fair mediation weakens quickly.
